# Error handling tests for MCP servers
# Tests how servers handle malformed requests and error conditions

# Set test environment  
env MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT=10s

# Test that mcp-probe prints sample requests when no args given
exec mcp-probe
stdout '"method":"initialize"'

# Test that mcpspy handles malformed JSON gracefully
exec bash -c 'echo "invalid json" | mcpspy --pretty 2>&1'
stdout 'invalid json'

# Test that mcpspy can parse any valid JSON
exec bash -c 'echo "{\"invalid\": true}" | mcpspy --pretty 2>&1'
stdout 'invalid'
